title: argyrolobium obcordatum
intro: Argyrolobium obcordatum, also known as the heart-leaved bushveld pea, is a type of leguminous plant native to southern Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Argyrolobium obcordatum are said to include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used in folk medicine in southern Africa, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
